title: critoniopsis obtusa
intro: Critoniopsis obtusa, a flowering plant species, is a member of the sunflower family and is commonly found in the coastal mountain ranges of California in the United States. The medicinal properties of Critoniopsis obtusa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in digestion and its ability to reduce inflammation, making it a useful remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Critoniopsis obtusa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for a range of applications and making it a versatile natural remedy.
